summary: Iteration 64 - Commission + Margin Distribution Engine and Services Page Improvements testing complete. All backend APIs (19/19 tests passed) and frontend components working correctly.

tests: Calculates margin pool correctly (gross_margin, protected_company_margin, distributable_margin)
Calculates distribution correctly (affiliate, sales, promo, referral, country_bonus amounts)
Commission Engine Preview API.formula_verified: Distributable margin = Gross margin - Protected company margin (8% of selling price)

tests: Contains config, explanation, and notes fields
Default values: protected=8%, affiliate=10%, sales=15%, promo=10%, referral=5%, country_bonus=5%
Flags allocation over 100% as invalid with warning
Handles multiple line items with correct totals
Respects ownership (no commission without affiliate/sales/referral IDs)

features: Service Hero Panel with 'BUSINESS SERVICES' label
4 feature cards (Clear discovery, Guest + account flow, B2B support, Operational visibility)
Request Quote and Explore All Services CTAs
6 category tabs (Printing & Branding, Creative & Design, Facilities Services, Technical Support, Business Support, Uniforms & Workwear)
Service cards with View Service and Request Quote buttons
Service Hero Panel with 'ACCOUNT SERVICES' label (account mode)
Request Quote and Request Business Pricing CTAs (account mode specific)
6 category tabs with correct service counts
Service cards with View Service and Request Quote buttons
Category tabs with active state styling
Service cards with icon, category badge, name, description
data-testid attributes for all interactive elements

seed_data_creation: None - used default service categories and services
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commission Engine APIs fully functional with correct margin distribution calculations. Protected company margin (8%) is never distributed. Services Page Improved (/services) and Account Services Discovery Page (/dashboard/services) both working with hero panels, category grids, and service cards. All 6 service categories have proper service counts. ServiceRequestActions component provides View Service and Request Quote buttons on each card.
